name: Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
Manicotti Shells - 8 ounces (1 package)
Tomato Sauce Ingredients:
- Mushroom stems and pieces - 4 ounces
- Tomato sauce - 15 ounces
- Tomato paste - 12 ounces
- Onion - 1/4 cup, chopped
- Garlic - 1 clove, minced
- Water - 1/2 cup
- Sugar - 1/2 teaspoon
- Salt - 1/2 teaspoon
- Pepper - 1/8 teaspoon
- Parmesan Cheese - 1/3 cup, grated
- Parsley - 1 tablespoon, snipped
- Italian Seasoning - 1 tablespoon
Cook the meat and onion in a large skillet until browned. Remove from heat and stir in remaining filling ingredients. Fill uncooked manicotti shells with meat mixture, packing into both ends. Place shells in an ungreased baking pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches). Preheat oven to 375°F. Cook tomato sauce ingredients until boiling, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for about 5 minutes. Pour sauce over filled shells. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake until shells are tender (1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours). Sprinkle with cheese and let cool 5-10 minutes before serving.
